description: Multiple cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerabilities in FreePBX 2.5.1, and other 2.4.x, 2.5.x, and pre-release 2.6.x versions, allow remote attackers to inject arbitrary web script or HTML via the (1) display parameter to reports.php, the (2) order and (3) extdisplay parameters to config.php, and the (4) sort parameter to recordings/index.php. NOTE: some of these details are obtained from third party information.
references:
https://exchange.xforce.ibmcloud.com/vulnerabilities/50361
http://osvdb.org/54260
http://osvdb.org/54261

http://www.securityfocus.com/bid/34857
http://osvdb.org/54259
